branch.branch_summary: After v6.5.0, run a runtime-backed frontier review for v6.6 Mission Control / Human Recognition redesign that makes Execution Hygiene visible: active work item, run contract, command safety boundary, handoff state, Council readiness, blockers, and proof.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v6.5 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Maintain v6.5.0 as the Execution Hygiene and Command Safety baseline, then choose the next AOF frontier through runtime-backed review with Mission Control / Human Recognition rendering of run contract, command safety, work item boundary, actor handoff, Council readiness, blockers, and runtime proof as the leading candidate.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Open an implementation task for the current frontier: After v6.5.0, run a runtime-backed frontier review for v6.6 Mission Control / Human Recognition redesign that makes Execution Hygiene visible: active work item, run contract, command safety boundary, handoff state, Council readiness, blockers, and proof.
